## Checklist

- [ ] `python -m pytest` passes
- [ ] New functions in `insights.py` have tests in `test_insights.py`
- [ ] New i18n strings have both EN and ES entries
- [ ] Schema changes are in `init_db()` as migrations
- [ ] No Streamlit imports added to `insights.py`
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated
